/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/iox-roudi.dir/source/roudi/application/roudi_main.cpp.o -o iox-roudi  -Wl,-rpath,/root/ros2_ws/build/iceoryx_posh:/root/ros2_ws/install/iceoryx_hoofs/lib: libiceoryx_posh_config.so libiceoryx_posh_roudi.so libiceoryx_posh.so /root/ros2_ws/install/iceoryx_hoofs/lib/libiceoryx_hoofs.so /root/ros2_ws/install/iceoryx_hoofs/lib/libiceoryx_platform.so -lrt -lpthread
